subcodes.title: Words to Mr. Woodcock, spoken on 1912-04-01
subcodes.first_line: The soul is a link between the body and the spirit. It receives bounties and virtues from the spirit and gives them to the body
subcodes.first_line_orig: نفس واسطهٴ ما بین روح و جسم است فیوضات و کمالات را از روح گرفته بجسم
subcodes.subjects: @mind as intermediary between soul and body, @relationship of the soul to the body, @the human soul
